_comment: Hand-curated gold corpus for Phase 3 nDCG/MRR regression checks. Used by `node scripts/eval-check.js --gold scripts/eval-gold.json`. Each query lists the session IDs that SHOULD appear in the top-K. Add new entries when you discover retrieval edge cases worth pinning. The IDs here align with the synthetic CORPUS seeded inside scripts/eval-check.js (eval-NNNN) so this file works against the same in-memory store the regression gate already builds.
